landing.title: Welcome to NusaNest
landing.subtitle: Student Living, Simplified
landing.cta_question: What would you like to do?
landing.setup_house_desc: Create your house and invite housemates

features.title: Create your house
features.desc: One person sets up the house in under 2 minutes — name it, add housemates, and choose what you share together.

features.title: Share the 6-digit code
features.desc: A unique code is generated for your house. Housemates enter it once to join. No accounts, no passwords.

features.title: Cleaning rotates automatically
features.desc: HouseHub tracks whose turn it is to clean. After someone logs their clean, the schedule moves to the next person.

features.title: Supplies rotate fairly
features.desc: Each shared item has its own rotation. When someone buys it, the next person's name appears automatically.

features.title: Full history for everyone
features.desc: Every clean and purchase is recorded. Anyone can check the History tab to see their own or a housemate's record.

features.title: Always in sync
features.desc: The dashboard updates in real time across all devices. No refresh needed.

faqs.q: Do I need to create an account?
faqs.a: No. NusaNest uses a 6-digit house code instead of accounts. Enter the code your housemate shares and you're in instantly.

faqs.q: What if I log something by mistake?
faqs.a: Every action has an Undo button that appears for 5 seconds after logging. Tap it to reverse the action completely.

faqs.q: Can we add our own supply items?
faqs.a: Yes — during setup you can add any custom item with your own emoji and name. NusaNest adapts to your house's needs.
The remaining members continue their rotation. New members can join anytime using the same house code.
Your house is only accessible to people who know your 6-digit code. Without it, nobody can see your house.

install.title: Install NusaNest
install.desc: Add to your home screen for the best experience

footer.main: NusaNest keeps shared homes organized and fair.
footer.desc: Cleaning schedules and supply responsibilities rotate clearly so everyone always knows whose turn it is.
footer.copyright: © 2025 NusaNest for Universitas Nusa Putra — International Student Living

join.title: Join a House
join.subtitle: Enter your 6-digit house code to join your housemates.
join.invalid_code: Invalid house code. Please check with your housemates.
join.error_find: Could not find house. Try again.
join.select_member_desc: Select your name from the list below:
join.personalize_desc: Optional — you can always change this later

house_name.title: Name your NusaNest
house_name.desc: Give your house a memorable name that your housemates will recognise.

member_count.title: How many housemates?
member_count.desc: Including yourself — how many people live in {{house}}?

cleaning_rotation.title: What is the cleaning rotation order?
cleaning_rotation.subtitle: Set the order for cleaning turns. The house follows this exact sequence.
cleaning_rotation.note: This order repeats forever. After the last person it goes back to the first.

supplies_rotation.title: What is the supplies rotation order?
supplies_rotation.subtitle: Set the order for buying shared supplies. This applies to all items equally.
supplies_rotation.note: This order applies to all shared items. After the last person it goes back to the first.

share_items.title: What do you share?
share_items.desc: Select everything your house buys together. Add your own items too — every house is different.

cleaning_schedule.title: Cleaning schedule?
cleaning_schedule.desc: Does your house rotate cleaning duties?

starting_point.title: Starting point
starting_point.desc: Tell us who last bought each item and who's next. This is how we start the rotation.

house_code.title: Your NusaNest is Ready!
house_code.desc: Share this code with your housemates:

who_are_you.title: Who are you?
who_are_you.desc: Select your name to enter your NusaNest:

profile_setup.title: Personalise your profile
profile_setup.desc: Optional — you can always change this later

history.title: History
history.future_desc: This period hasn't started yet. Come back when we get there — NusaNest will have everything ready for you. 📅
history.before_start_desc_2: . There are no records before that date — this is where your story begins. 🏠
history.no_data_desc: No cleaning or supply activity was recorded during this period. Nothing wrong — sometimes months are just quiet!

cleaning.at_least_one: ⚠️ At least 1 person must remain in the rotation.

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.empty_desc: We'll let you know when something happens in your house.

travel.title: Travel Mode
travel.supplies_desc: Cleaning turns will be skipped automatically. For supplies, decide if turns should be skipped or covered by someone (creating an IOU).

report.title: Report A Problem
report.duration_label: How long has this been going on?
report.optional_desc: Optional — but more detail helps the university understand
report.placeholder_desc: e.g. Has not cleaned for 3 weeks despite reminders...
report.cosign_desc: You can ask your housemates to co-sign this report. They will receive a private notification and can choose to support or decline. This is completely optional.
report.resolution_reminder: "Before this reaches the university — have you had a chance to calmly let your housemate know about this issue? Sometimes a quiet, respectful conversation is all it takes. The university's involvement is here as a last resort, not a first step."
report.error: Failed to submit report. Please try again.
report.skip_toast: Good luck 🤝 You can always come back if needed.
